heading: Cross references
label: 7124 Cross references
text: For criminal penalties for concealment of property, false statement, or falsifying and destroying records, in connection with any closing agreement, compromise, or offer of compromise, see section 7206.
notes: Amendments1998— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 105–206section 7123 of this title1982—Subsec. (a). , struck out heading “Criminal penalties”.Pub. L. 97–258, § 3(f)(12)(A)Subsec. (b). , struck out subsec. (b) which set forth cross reference to R.S. 3469 () relating to compromises after judgment.Pub. L. 97–258, § 3(f)(12)(B)31 U.S.C. 194
